records.descriptionTemplate: A mysterious lady who crawled out of a wax sculpture. Her mind is extremely chaotic, likely a patient in the late stages of hysteria.

records.name: "@2 Blesser"
records.descriptionTemplate: The Hive Will extends to wherever its claws reach.

records.name: "@2 Performer"
records.descriptionTemplate: What kind of melody lies hidden beneath the trajectory of the conductor's baton?

records.name: "@2 Protector"
records.descriptionTemplate: The Hive Will perceives all within its sight.

records.name: "@2 Silver @1 Integration"
records.descriptionTemplate: Distorted limbs twisted together.

records.name: "@2 cannot @1 transfer"
records.descriptionTemplate: The signal drifts in the air shrouded in gray mist.

records.name: "Abyss Dweller"
records.descriptionTemplate: A mysterious young man who travels with the Seafarers. His jagged spines and fish-like ear fins betray that he is no ordinary person.

records.name: "An Eye for an Eye"
records.descriptionTemplate: Wax sculpture outcasts huddled underground, always ready to give everything for the art of Master Rogers.

records.name: "Apostle of the Edict"
records.descriptionTemplate: A servant remade to embody the "Divine Mother's" will, tasked with ensuring her commands are fulfilled.

records.name: "Apostle of the Sea"
records.descriptionTemplate: In this moment, she acts not from madness, but from deepest faith.

records.name: "Apostle of the Sea"
records.descriptionTemplate: She has given up resisting the erosion of "Cataclysms," and the pollution of the spirit dimension has turned the once noble and powerful Awakener completely mad.

records.name: "Argonas"
records.descriptionTemplate: A marine creature mutated by the influence of "the Unknown." Its softened shell has fused tightly with its flesh, and it can no longer spread itself like a sail.

records.name: "Blade of Utopia"
records.descriptionTemplate: Leader of the Aram Tribe. She will serve as their banner, blade, and shield, guiding her people to a new future and awaiting Her return.

records.name: "Blessed Priest"
records.descriptionTemplate: A distorted entity forged by the High Priestess, powerful and deeply trusted.

records.name: "Blossom of Sludge"
records.descriptionTemplate: Lily, driven to madness by eerie whispers.

records.name: "Brain in a Vat"
records.descriptionTemplate: When her voice came through the communicator, it was the most reassuring moment of your mission. You have relied on her exceptional wisdom enough.

records.name: "Brain in a Vat"
records.descriptionTemplate: The moment her voice comes through the communicator is the most reassuring part of your mission. You have relied on her brilliant mind long enough. Sever the Link with her.

records.name: "Breath of Fertility"
records.descriptionTemplate: "Defeat them, soothe them—but even if you glimpse my illusions, do not fall for them."

records.name: "Caregiver"
records.descriptionTemplate: Its appearance has changed dramatically, vaguely familiar. After several exchanges of glances, you realize this is a Seafarer's acolyte who cannot resist the influence of "Cataclysm."

records.name: "Cerberus"
records.descriptionTemplate: The skull of the greedy hound. Its ominous gaze has fixed upon you.

records.name: "Chainbreaker"
records.descriptionTemplate: A swift Awakener assassin who calls herself Helot. She seems to have a subtle connection with Lily.

records.name: "Charitable" Kenny
records.descriptionTemplate: He used to be a good man, willing to work 20 hours a day just to "raise" the neighbor's orphan.

records.name: "Controlled"
records.descriptionTemplate: Driven by the instinct of life, it willingly sustains the parasite.

records.name: "Corrupted Brain"
records.descriptionTemplate: She stepped through the Gateway, finally seeing the truth of the universe's blind chaos. Oh, you foolish souls—to bow and embrace destruction is the only future that exists.

records.name: "Crimson"
records.descriptionTemplate: The oldest Golem in the world who came from the distant stars.

records.name: "Current"
records.descriptionTemplate: Interference-type Dissolute infused with Aequor power, as beautiful as tropical coral.

records.name: "Dimensional Hole"
records.descriptionTemplate: A mutant formed from a large mass of D-Slime. It splits when its HP runs low.

records.name: "Divus: The Onyx Plume"
records.descriptionTemplate: "I will reclaim our freedom, Pollux..."

records.name: "Dying Whistle"
records.descriptionTemplate: A wild horse covered in Dissolution wounds. Large and remarkably vital, though its Dissolution wounds also make it more vulnerable.

records.name: "Endless Hunger"
records.descriptionTemplate: The priest of the royal altar, responsible for laying the deceased to rest, offers them to Necrovia's king as per the wish of mournful memory.

records.name: "Eternal Assistant"
records.descriptionTemplate: Low-ranking priests of the Eternal Kingdom. They are not permitted to enter the temple without the High Priestess's approval.

records.name: "Eternal Host"
records.descriptionTemplate: It offers its flesh to the Unknown without restraint. No one cares about its will.

records.name: "Eternal Zealot"
records.descriptionTemplate: Killing, chanting, sacrifice... For the Eternal Kingdom, they will offer everything.

records.name: "Find the Answer Within"
records.descriptionTemplate: A product of the Sculptors' Association's modifications. Brainwashed and filled with conviction, it grows stronger with every battle.

records.name: "Garmr?"
records.descriptionTemplate: A creature formed from drifting Dimension fragments, living in harmony with its trophies.

records.name: "Gentleman"
records.descriptionTemplate: The Sculptors gained Juliette's approval with this set of statues. The Church of the Lightbearers never wastes any relic.

records.name: "Geometric Shape"
records.descriptionTemplate: Interference-type Dissolute infused with Dimensional power, whose dripping D-Slime might distort light.

records.name: "Guard of Iensmo"
records.descriptionTemplate: It merges with the D-Hyperplasia so seamlessly and so beautifully that you almost believe it was always meant to be this way.

records.name: "Guardian of the Lantern"
records.descriptionTemplate: Ordinary follower of the Church of the Lightbearers. Blindly worships the destruction proclaimed in their doctrine.

records.name: "Helpful" Jackson
records.descriptionTemplate: He used to be a good man, willing to stand guard on rainy nights for every passerby, just to ensure everyone "returns home safely."

records.name: "Host"
records.descriptionTemplate: It offers its flesh to the Unknown without restraint. No one cares about its will.

records.name: "Hypnotic Shaggai"
records.descriptionTemplate: A consistently gentle psychiatrist, always maintaining an appropriate smile.

records.name: "Hysteric"
records.descriptionTemplate: Once well-versed in Socrates, once a believer in Freud. What a shame—now there is nothing left but hysterical screams.

records.name: "Iron Pickaxe" Lucen
records.descriptionTemplate: He once had a family. Now only madness remains. He is capable of Heavy Blow, and attacks can make him flinch.

records.name: "Key to the Gate"
records.descriptionTemplate: Guardian of the Gate of Extremes, an existence beyond time and space, a symbol of absolute wisdom.

records.name: "Kind-hearted" Freeman
records.descriptionTemplate: He used to be a good man, willing to sweep 20 streets a day so others could "peek" at the tranquility of Londinium.

records.name: "Lady Chatterley"
records.descriptionTemplate: Red wine, desserts, the sweetness of romance—all of it is gone. Standing before you is a woman consumed by bitterness and resentment.

records.name: "Lady of the Depths"
records.descriptionTemplate: "I am neither the first sacrifice nor the last... but I wish to live!"

records.name: "Lady"
records.descriptionTemplate: The Sculptors gained Juliette's approval with this set of statues. The Church of the Lightbearers never wastes any relic.

records.name: "Lampshade" Aisha
records.descriptionTemplate: Once a hero, now standing guard beside Juliette. Together they wait for a future of eternal light.

records.name: "Lemurian Deipara"
records.descriptionTemplate: The weak, naive "Her" is dead—now, she is the noble "Divine Mother," the unassailable "Heavenly Queen."

records.name: "Listen to the Revelation"
records.descriptionTemplate: A cyborg consumed by obsession, yearning for revelation. It calls upon its believers and strengthens them.

records.name: "Little Bee"
records.descriptionTemplate: That is what its trainer calls it. Relatively gentle in nature, but mind its spines.

records.name: "Little Wasp"
records.descriptionTemplate: The most troublesome member for any trainer. Naturally irritable—watch out for its spines.

records.name: "Lord of Necrovia"
records.descriptionTemplate: "Rude gestures are not befitting a guest's etiquette, {Male=Mr.,Female=Miss} Keeper."

records.name: "Luminary"
records.descriptionTemplate: "Forever may the Light shine..."

records.name: "Maiden of the Gibbous Moon"
records.descriptionTemplate: Sorel's closest maid, obsessed with every manner of skin-whitening formulas.

records.name: "Mareel Glow"
records.descriptionTemplate: She calculates, plans, and raises the banner. She will complete her mission, no matter the cost.

records.name: "Matron" Sarah
records.descriptionTemplate: I'm sorry... It's all my fault...

records.name: "Matron" Sarah
records.descriptionTemplate: Sarah, lost in Madness beyond her control, bears a faint silver scar at the corner of her forehead.

records.name: "Mistbound Sojourner"
records.descriptionTemplate: A girl summoned from another world by the "Sect of Astral Dawn." Beneath her adorable appearance lies madness beyond mortal comprehension.

records.name: "Mr. Lawrence"
records.descriptionTemplate: The weight of his duties has long since bent his back. Work, work, work—that is his life now.

records.name: "N"
records.descriptionTemplate: A mist of chaos that lurks throughout the world, delighting in the suffering and despair of humanity.

records.name: "N"
records.descriptionTemplate: A mist of chaos that lurks throughout the world, delighting in the suffering and despair of humanity.

records.name: "Neferure"
records.descriptionTemplate: Sleep, Neferure. Sleep, my dear child. Sleep through a childhood far too brief, in a dream that grows with the wind.

records.name: "Ocean Star"
records.descriptionTemplate: The "Dimension Hole" influenced by the power of deep sea. After much thought, Czort still decided to give it a splendid name.

records.name: "Oceanic Memories"
records.descriptionTemplate: He set out to sea in pursuit of a living. Now that it is becoming a fading memory, he has long since lost the place he once called home.

records.name: "Ognotz"
records.descriptionTemplate: A marine creature mutated by the influence of "the Unknown." Its softened shell has fused tightly with its flesh; forcibly separating them would strip it of any chance of ever reaching the other shore.

records.name: "Pain"
records.descriptionTemplate: Before diving into the ocean and crossing the sea, it remembered that Pain Street was a narrow path leading to the square.

records.name: "Painkiller"
records.descriptionTemplate: Take a deep breath, count to ten. The pain will fade soon. She will protect other allied units.

records.name: "Palace Housekeeper" Fran
records.descriptionTemplate: The oath of eternal companionship was made long before the pledge of utmost loyalty.

records.name: "Parasite"
records.descriptionTemplate: The Seafarer, mutated by the influence of the "Cataclysm," grows parasitic growths from the inside out, devouring it into an empty shell.

records.name: "Petrifying Eyes"
records.descriptionTemplate: For those she wishes to protect, she can become strong. Ensure sufficient Arithmetica to counter her stasis curse.

records.name: "Pohnpei Hymn"
records.descriptionTemplate: High-ranking priests deeply trusted by the High Priestess. They prostrate themselves at her feet and bow in submission.

records.name: "Priest of the Abyss"
records.descriptionTemplate: Hearken to His voice. Bow... before His glory!

records.name: "Primordial Devoutee"
records.descriptionTemplate: The guardian of the Eternal Kingdom's gate, a lighthouse for homebound souls.

records.name: "Reflection of Celephais"
records.descriptionTemplate: Coral, parasites... Do different hyperplasias come from the same source of Cataclysm? We don't know.

records.name: "Remnant Omen"
records.descriptionTemplate: In the dreams of the Abyssal Prison, the abandoned fates saw their own threads. They wail, crawling along those fragile strands, squirming toward their origin: "Dear Mother of Fate... do you hear our call?"

records.name: "Replacement"
records.descriptionTemplate: One of the countless predecessors of little George. Even the most careful preservation cannot withstand the wear of time.

records.name: "Sacrifice"
records.descriptionTemplate: Whatever it once was, it is now but a vessel awaiting the "Divine Messenger."

records.name: "Sacrifice"
records.descriptionTemplate: Whatever it once was, it is now but a vessel awaiting the "Divine Messenger."

records.name: "Sanguivore Patient"
records.descriptionTemplate: A pale girl lurking in the corner, seemingly with a particular fondness for blood.

records.name: "Scuttler"
records.descriptionTemplate: She is elusive, intimately familiar with every alley in the East District; she is the "Scuttler".

records.name: "Sea Cave Special"
records.descriptionTemplate: One day the seed will sprout, and the sprout will grow into a mighty tree—if it has never been tainted.

records.name: "Serket"
records.descriptionTemplate: Beware of every withered vine of Remouahe, and beware its blood-red square pupils.

records.name: "Skull Huntress"
records.descriptionTemplate: A mysterious merchant from the past who gauges everything through trade.

records.name: "Slumbering Sovereign"
records.descriptionTemplate: When the Stars Are Right, He will end his eons-long slumber and return to His throne. Whether this is what He truly desires, however, remains unknown.

records.name: "Sophia"
records.descriptionTemplate: A sorrowful fate has twisted her. Everything is hatred. Everything is injustice.

records.name: "Stereo"
records.descriptionTemplate: Interference-type Dissolute infused with Dimensional power, whose dripping D-Slime might distort light.

records.name: "Surgical Blade"
records.descriptionTemplate: Lie down, relax. The doctor will cut away all your troubles. An individual with very high ATK.

records.name: "Sweet Demon"
records.descriptionTemplate: A lively girl skilled in... "special training." She already has 102 slaves and is searching for her destined next one.

records.name: "Tawil"
records.descriptionTemplate: Proxy of the Aeon of Sagacity. Wielder of Knowledge. Guide of Mythag. A Foe to Be Feared.

records.name: "Tela Perpetua"
records.descriptionTemplate: Master of the web. Prisoner of the web.

records.name: "The Apostle of Judgment"
records.descriptionTemplate: She cast aside her human form and her humanity, all to bring a fleeting happiness. But can extreme benevolence still be called benevolence?

records.name: "The Echo of Ensereire"
records.descriptionTemplate: Coral, parasites... Do different hyperplasias come from the same source of Cataclysm? We don't know.

records.name: "The Final Mire"
records.descriptionTemplate: D-Slime grants all things an equal end. We will all become one.

records.name: "The Great Magician Houdini"
records.descriptionTemplate: The Great Magician Houdini makes a dazzling entrance. According to her poster, 41 people have gone missing at her performances.

records.name: "The Heart of Strigoi?"
records.descriptionTemplate: It is said to possess two hearts that beat as one. No one knows what will happen if one of them is pierced.

records.name: "The Living Flame"
records.descriptionTemplate: "Dominion over countless fire spirits, The Living Flame shall descend from the heavens in amber flames. When He arrives, all things shall face equal death."

records.name: "The Painter"
records.descriptionTemplate: I will reveal this world's true reality...

records.name: "The Sage"
records.descriptionTemplate: No words are needed to describe her. She is Ramona. Sever the link with her.

records.name: "The Sage"
records.descriptionTemplate: A phantom drawn from your memories. You know it is not real.

records.name: "The Sorcerer"
records.descriptionTemplate: "Oh no! Where's my "Londinium Crime Records"? I went through all that trouble to borrow it from the police!" While the librarian wails, Casiah the great magician is absorbing new "emotions" from the sea of knowledge.

records.name: "The Void Claims All"
records.descriptionTemplate: D-Slime grants death to all things equally. All things fade and become one.

records.name: "Tick-Tock Man"
records.descriptionTemplate: Erica has completely gone mad... Is it due to the Black Pool?

records.name: "Tide"
records.descriptionTemplate: Interference-type Dissolute infused with Aequor power, as beautiful as tropical coral.

records.name: "To Ensure Continuity"
records.descriptionTemplate: This place is filled with a yearning for survival. He seeks it out like a moth drawn to flame.

records.name: "To Horla"
records.descriptionTemplate: In the only poem she wrote, she described gardens, sunshine, and laughter. She buried her friend's body with petals. In the poem, she was as kind as a rose.

records.name: "Vengeance Blade"
records.descriptionTemplate: A mighty warrior wielding a heavy blade with the strength of a giant.

records.name: "Virtue Knight"
records.descriptionTemplate: The young knight once swore allegiance to you and has never broken his vow.

records.name: "Virtue Knight"
records.descriptionTemplate: The young Knight once swore allegiance to you, and he never broke his oath. Sever the Link with him.

records.name: "Wallachia"
records.descriptionTemplate: Before diving into the ocean and crossing the sea, it thought it wouldn't carry such a bloodline.

records.name: "Water Lily"
records.descriptionTemplate: She was once a lonely, drifting fallen petal. Now she is a resident and barrier of the Rye Sanatorium.

records.name: "Whale Leap"
records.descriptionTemplate: Lotan, bored with the journey, has fallen into a maddening desire for battle. Beware her unyielding will after Rouse—she can remove multiple stacks of Weakness and Vulnerable each turn.

records.name: "Whale Leap"
records.descriptionTemplate: Your swordsmanship teacher, your first fearless warrior. Sever the Link with her.

records.name: "Wick Attendant"
records.descriptionTemplate: A pastor of the Church of the Lightbearers. They relay the will of the Lantern, directing the congregation in Dissolution zones.

records.name: Abyssal Spider
records.descriptionTemplate: Fragments of a broken fate cast into the Abyssal Prison, coalesced into arachnid forms by the will of Nefraea.

records.name: Abyssal Spider Cluster
records.descriptionTemplate: They mimic the gait of Leng Spiders, yet have no threads to cling to. Masterless servants, attending to a future that has already been erased.

records.name: Abyssal Squire
records.descriptionTemplate: A Maid who has fallen into the Abyssal Prison. She maintains her composure, endlessly repeating the motions of wiping, tidying, and smiling within the void of agony—serving a stage that no longer exists.

records.name: Aequor Hybrid Mutant
records.descriptionTemplate: A composite-type Dissolution Mutant affected by Aequor's power. Czort specifically reminded not to give them overly fanciful names.

records.name: Aequor Super Mutant
records.descriptionTemplate: A hyper-variant Mutant Dissolute affected by the power of deep seas. Czort specifically reminded not to give them overly fanciful names.

records.name: Afumza
records.descriptionTemplate: The deity of Elworth, remade by the Lantern, ignites the eternal and undying Frostfire for the rebirth of the snow mountains.

records.name: Agent
records.descriptionTemplate: The lower-ranking the member, the more exhilarated they feel about this rare and significant operation.

records.name: Aram Guard Captain
records.descriptionTemplate: After each generation's bonfire feast, the most outstanding seeds will grow to become the new Guard Captain.

records.name: Aram Heron
records.descriptionTemplate: Born from the flame of the sacred tree, the self-made one leads you all into the realm of death.

records.name: Aram Lantern
records.descriptionTemplate: A manifestation of the Lightbearer's symbol. Do not question the source of its Gnosis.

records.name: Aram Lantern
records.descriptionTemplate: A manifestation of the Lightbearer's symbol. Do not question the source of its Gnosis.

records.name: Aram Warrior
records.descriptionTemplate: Aramites possess an extraordinary ability to proliferate, but the warriors of Aram are still someone's son, someone's father.

records.name: Aram Warrior
records.descriptionTemplate: Aramites possess an extraordinary ability to proliferate, but the warriors of Aram are still someone's son, someone's father.

records.name: Aram Warrior
records.descriptionTemplate: Aramites possess an extraordinary ability to proliferate, but the warriors of Aram are still someone's son, someone's father.

records.name: Aram Warrior
records.descriptionTemplate: Aramites possess an extraordinary ability to proliferate, but the warriors of Aram are still someone's son, someone's father.

records.name: Ashen Dissolute
records.descriptionTemplate: Born from ash, most of its spiritual essence has been worn away by Dissolution.

records.name: Ashen Dissolute
records.descriptionTemplate: Born from ash, most of its spiritual essence has been worn away by Dissolution.

records.name: Avant-Garde Art
records.descriptionTemplate: The art of combining wax sculpture with Dissolution. Once exhibited at the Cité Expo, it was withdrawn after causing widespread panic.

records.name: Average Servant
records.descriptionTemplate: A servant who reshapes itself to better serve the "Divine Mother's" will, proud in its mission.

records.name: Balefire Ballerina
records.descriptionTemplate: The love for ballet, the reverence for art... The dancer will fully express it with the burning of the fouled emerald flames.

records.name: Basic Exercise I
records.descriptionTemplate: Simple wax sculpture drafts. Twisted into impossible shapes, they offer no complaint.

records.name: Basic Exercise II
records.descriptionTemplate: Simple wax sculpture drafts. Twisted into impossible shapes, they offer no complaint.

records.name: Blightfin Fry
records.descriptionTemplate: Fry mutated by ritual's influence, now rotting and decayed.

records.name: Blightfin Swarm
records.descriptionTemplate: Putrid fry assemble, a stench-ridden swarm of decay.

records.name: Blightfin Tyrant
records.descriptionTemplate: The fry has become king—this decaying body immortalized by faith.

records.name: Captain
records.descriptionTemplate: A mid-level officer of the Mystia Treaty Committee, with solid personal ability and strong leadership qualities.

records.name: Cat Detective
records.descriptionTemplate: Some jobs are not reserved for canines alone.

records.name: Cat Warrior
records.descriptionTemplate: An experimental product of the Mystia Treaty Committee. It has injured seven trainers so far.

records.name: Chanter
records.descriptionTemplate: A devout believer of the Eternal Kingdom and the most faithful servant of the Sovereign.

records.name: Child of Enchantment
records.descriptionTemplate: Those wild ideas in its head are destined to die before they ever see the light of day.

records.name: Child of Slumber
records.descriptionTemplate: If it could choose, it would not want to wake up either.

records.name: Child of Water
records.descriptionTemplate: Contrary to all expectations, it hates water.

records.name: Claw of Swift Assault
records.descriptionTemplate: A pursuing foot that tears through dimensional rifts, catching every reckless soul.

records.name: Collaborative Dissolute
records.descriptionTemplate: A small monster born from D-Slime. It poses little threat.

records.name: Collaborative Dissolute
records.descriptionTemplate: A small monster born from D-Slime. It poses little threat.

records.name: Composite Dissolute
records.descriptionTemplate: A mutant formed from a large mass of D-Slime. It splits when its HP runs low.

records.name: Corpse Excrescence
records.descriptionTemplate: A product of Necrovia's secret arts: a fearless warrior, a passable dessert.

records.name: Corpse Excrescence
records.descriptionTemplate: A product of Necrovia's secret arts: a fearless warrior, a passable dessert.

records.name: Corpse Excrescence
records.descriptionTemplate: A product of Necrovia's secret arts: a fearless warrior, a passable dessert.

records.name: Countess
records.descriptionTemplate: "Dearest Countess, my once desire. Now, you have become my loyal guard. Offer her a poem on my behalf."

records.name: Cruel "Father"
records.descriptionTemplate: Test subjects have no parents, yet still long for someone to take on the role of "father"—even if he is unqualified.

records.name: Cursed Brood
records.descriptionTemplate: At times, Miryam wonders: Is this a redundant cycle of rebirth, or God's acknowledgment of her devotion?

records.name: D-Slime
records.descriptionTemplate: This is nothing but D-Slime. Don't think about what's inside.

records.name: Devouring Howl
records.descriptionTemplate: A stray dog driven into a frenzy by the deepening Dissolution. Its attacks are swift and relentless, leaving little room to defend.

records.name: Devout Followers
records.descriptionTemplate: Ordinary follower of the Church of the Lightbearers. Blindly worships the destruction proclaimed in their doctrine.

records.name: Dimension Fragment
records.descriptionTemplate: Fragile, drifting dimension fragments. When the rifts of dimensions are torn open, they drift and scatter.

records.name: Dimension Fragment
records.descriptionTemplate: Fragile, drifting dimension fragments. When the rifts of dimensions are torn open, they drift and scatter.

records.name: Dimensional Beasts
records.descriptionTemplate: A creature formed from drifting Dimension fragments, living in harmony with its trophies.

records.name: Dimensional Hunter
records.descriptionTemplate: A creature formed from drifting Dimension fragments, living in harmony with its trophies.

records.name: Dimensional Rendclaw
records.descriptionTemplate: A pursuing foot that tears through dimensional rifts, catching every reckless soul.

records.name: Dissoluted Hound
records.descriptionTemplate: A stray dog covered in Dissolution marks. Its attacks are swift and relentless.

records.name: Dissoluted Humanoid
records.descriptionTemplate: A human corroded by D-Slime. Forms twisted, visages bleak.

records.name: Dissoluted Humanoid
records.descriptionTemplate: A human corroded by D-Slime. Forms twisted, visages bleak.

records.name: Dissoluted Mad Horse
records.descriptionTemplate: A wild horse covered in Dissolution wounds. Large and remarkably vital, though its Dissolution wounds also make it more vulnerable.

records.name: Dissoluted Rat King
records.descriptionTemplate: A tail soaked in Dissolution binds them together. They suffer, yet cannot be parted.

records.name: Dissoluted Rat King
records.descriptionTemplate: A tail soaked in Dissolution binds them together. They suffer, yet cannot be parted.

records.name: Dissoluted Rat King
records.descriptionTemplate: A tail soaked in Dissolution binds them together. They suffer, yet cannot be parted.

records.name: Doctor
records.descriptionTemplate: Their diagnosis is your death. She will protect other allied units.

records.name: Doomscale Fry
records.descriptionTemplate: Fry warped by ritual, spreading misfortune and calamity.

records.name: Doomscale Swarm
records.descriptionTemplate: Cursed fry converge, a cataclysmic wave of doom.

records.name: Doomscale Tyrant
records.descriptionTemplate: The fry has become king—one day, misfortune and disaster will sweep the world.

records.name: Elite Aram Guard
records.descriptionTemplate: He guards Aram's future but never questions what it will look like.

records.name: Elite Operative
records.descriptionTemplate: Fewer retreats, fewer rewards. More risks, more trouble.

records.name: Embrace Evolution
records.descriptionTemplate: The world is burning; only those who are enlightened to abandon everything can attain redemption.

records.name: Embrace You and Me
records.descriptionTemplate: "Dear, can I hold you in my arms one more time?"

records.name: Emergency Contact
records.descriptionTemplate: "Sis, I want so badly to hear your voice just one more time."

records.name: Emergency Contact
records.descriptionTemplate: "Sis, I want so badly to hear your voice just one more time."

records.name: Eternal Light: Nubian Giant Tree
records.descriptionTemplate: It no longer conceals its core. "Forever may the Light shine."

records.name: Expedition Leader
records.descriptionTemplate: He refused to abandon his teammates swallowed by the mountains. He turned back. He got what he wished for.

records.name: Experimental Work I
records.descriptionTemplate: A cutting-edge wax sculpture draft, filled with the sculptor's boundless imagination and exploration of Dissolution.

records.name: Experimental Work II
records.descriptionTemplate: A cutting-edge wax sculpture draft, filled with the sculptor's boundless imagination and exploration of Dissolution.

records.name: Fastrunner
records.descriptionTemplate: A nimble street kid from the East District. He launches a swift attack from the very start.

records.name: Feel the Evolution
records.descriptionTemplate: The world is burning; only those who listen to the universe's hum can attain redemption.

records.name: Fetal Movement: Nubia Cub
records.descriptionTemplate: A small creature with goat hooves, its body entangled with abnormal flesh. It disappears instantly upon receiving a fatal wound.

records.name: Filthy Brood
records.descriptionTemplate: At times, Miryam wonders: Is this a redundant cycle of rebirth, or God's acknowledgment of her devotion?

records.name: First Variant
records.descriptionTemplate: A human in the early stages of the "@2 Ritual," crossing beyond their own limits and stepping toward the threshold of evolution.

records.name: First Variant
records.descriptionTemplate: A human in the early stages of the "@2 Ritual," crossing beyond their own limits and stepping toward the threshold of evolution.

records.name: Flower of Avarice
records.descriptionTemplate: Greed is the only image of life. Is it not?

records.name: Flower of Desire
records.descriptionTemplate: In the garden of the past, desire was the only nourishment.

records.name: Follower
records.descriptionTemplate: In Cité's poetry, they follow Colette's path.

records.name: Foulblood Fry
records.descriptionTemplate: Fry corrupted by ritual, inheriting tainted bloodlines.

records.name: Foulblood Swarm
records.descriptionTemplate: Fry of tainted blood gather, forming a defiled tide of filth.

records.name: Foulblood Tyrant
records.descriptionTemplate: The fry has become king—this foul bloodline grows stronger daily.

records.name: Frenzied Wild Dog
records.descriptionTemplate: A stray dog driven mad by Dissolution. Its attacks are swift and relentless.

records.name: Ghoul Attendant
records.descriptionTemplate: Residents of Necrovia are everywhere—awkward diners and coarse ingredients.

records.name: Ghoul Attendant
records.descriptionTemplate: Residents of Necrovia are everywhere—awkward diners and coarse ingredients.

records.name: Ghoul Guard
records.descriptionTemplate: He fought to protect both the royal estate and the meals within it.

records.name: Ghoul Guard Captain
records.descriptionTemplate: They have no remarkable talents to speak of, only the courage to willingly sacrifice themselves for Necrovia.

records.name: Hardhitter
records.descriptionTemplate: A strong street kid from the East District. His attacks can weaken enemies, and he deploys a shield to protect himself.

records.name: Helot
records.descriptionTemplate: A swift Awakener assassin who calls herself Helot. She seems to have a subtle connection with Lily.

records.name: Hunting Dog's Claw
records.descriptionTemplate: A pursuing foot that tears through dimensional rifts, catching every reckless soul.

records.name: Interdimensional Student
records.descriptionTemplate: On these monsters from another dimension, you can see the mark of Mythag.

records.name: Interdimensional Student
records.descriptionTemplate: On these monsters from another dimension, you can see the mark of Mythag.

records.name: Interference-Type Dissolute
records.descriptionTemplate: A medium-sized monster born from D-Slime. Its attacks disrupt the minds of its enemies.

records.name: Interference-Type Dissolute
records.descriptionTemplate: A medium-sized monster born from D-Slime. Its attacks disrupt the minds of its enemies.

records.name: King of Kids
records.descriptionTemplate: A battle-hardened King of Kids. The bottle in his hand inflicts wounds.

records.name: Koum
records.descriptionTemplate: A large, dog-like monster. Why would it leave behind human bite marks?

records.name: Koum
records.descriptionTemplate: A large, dog-like monster. Why would it leave behind human bite marks?

records.name: Lantern
records.descriptionTemplate: A manifestation of the Lightbearer's symbol. Do not question the source of its Gnosis.

records.name: Lantern
records.descriptionTemplate: A manifestation of the Lightbearer's symbol. Do not question the source of its Gnosis.

records.name: Lantern Believer
records.descriptionTemplate: Ordinary devotees of the Church of the Lightbearers, who left home for faith.

records.name: Lantern Devotee
records.descriptionTemplate: Believers in "the wick that burns shall be redeemed," fearless through devotion.

records.name: Lantern Pastor
records.descriptionTemplate: A pastor of the Church of the Lightbearers. They relay the will of the Lantern, directing the congregation in Dissolution zones.

records.name: Lantern: Commander
records.descriptionTemplate: An outstanding officer of the Mystia Treaty Committee and the Lantern's Escort Captain. She keeps watch over the flame until its light spreads to every corner.

records.name: Lantern: Defender
records.descriptionTemplate: A former Committee member chosen by the Lantern. She prostrates herself under the Lantern's control, yearning for its light to fall upon her.

records.name: Large Skirt
records.descriptionTemplate: A haughty lady in outdated formal wear. Whatever you do, do not show her the latest fashion magazine.

records.name: Large Skirt
records.descriptionTemplate: A haughty lady in outdated formal wear. Whatever you do, do not show her the latest fashion magazine.

records.name: Leng Spider
records.descriptionTemplate: The arachnid forms of Arachne’s Maids, once human. They carry the strands of destiny, weaving a boundless web for their mistress.

records.name: Leng Spider Cluster
records.descriptionTemplate: A swarm of Leng Spiders, the very fibers of the Web of Fate. When these myriad bodies coalesce, they become fate itself.

records.name: Leng Spider Maid
records.descriptionTemplate: Leng Spiders granted humanoid shells, meticulously attired as they move between the stages of the Theater of Fate. The Manipulator of Fate never forces puppets to become her maids; they always choose this path of their own will.

records.name: Lightbearer Followers
records.descriptionTemplate: Ordinary follower of the Church of the Lightbearers. Blindly worships the destruction proclaimed in their doctrine.

records.name: Lost One
records.descriptionTemplate: Every face was once the lifetime of some world, or some person.

records.name: Mad Horse of Agony
records.descriptionTemplate: A wild horse covered in Dissolution wounds. Large and remarkably vital, though its Dissolution wounds also make it more vulnerable.

records.name: Mad Stonebreaker
records.descriptionTemplate: He once had a family. Now only madness remains. He is capable of Heavy Blow, and attacks can make him flinch.

records.name: Major
records.descriptionTemplate: A senior officer of the Mystia Treaty Committee, recipient of the Imperial Medal, and decorated veteran of multiple operations against Dissolution.

records.name: Martyr
records.descriptionTemplate: They carry out the will of the gods; no one cares about survival or destruction, no one cares about error or correctness.

records.name: Measurer
records.descriptionTemplate: A Maid authorized to "measure" fate. She gauges the weight of every strand, reporting any tangles to the Manipulator of Fate. As for what happens after—she remains indifferent.

records.name: Merge You and Me
records.descriptionTemplate: The end has come. The remnant spirits call out to one another: please merge into one with my spirit.

records.name: Merge into One
records.descriptionTemplate: In the ritual of fusion, it is impossible to tell which part belongs to "you" and which belongs to "me."

records.name: Metamorph
records.descriptionTemplate: A human in the late stages of the "@2 Ritual." In the agony of dissolving flesh, it shall transcend the limits of humanity.

records.name: Metamorph
records.descriptionTemplate: A human in the late stages of the "@2 Ritual." In the agony of dissolving flesh, it shall transcend the limits of humanity.

records.name: Metamorph
records.descriptionTemplate: A human in the late stages of the "@2 Ritual." In the agony of dissolving flesh, it shall transcend the limits of humanity.

records.name: Mr. Integrity
records.descriptionTemplate: The wick is about to break his back. Why is there no one to support him by the shoulder?

records.name: Ms. Humility
records.descriptionTemplate: The light is about to melt her face. Why is no one holding an umbrella for her?

records.name: Multidimensional Entity
records.descriptionTemplate: A person who has strayed into dimensional fissures, their body torn by space. Their loyalty to the Sculptors' Association remains unwavering.

records.name: Mutated Penguin
records.descriptionTemplate: Since Dissolution and Frostfire have descended upon this land, tranquility has become a luxury for the creatures of Elworth.

records.name: Mutated Penguin
records.descriptionTemplate: Since Dissolution and Frostfire have descended upon this land, tranquility has become a luxury for the creatures of Elworth.

records.name: Nubia
records.descriptionTemplate: Beware of every withered vine of Remouahe, and beware its blood-red square pupils.

records.name: Nubia Cub
records.descriptionTemplate: It has the hooves of a goat, and will instantly vanish when the pupil at the center of its body is pierced.

records.name: Nubia, the Holy River
records.descriptionTemplate: Beware of every withered vine of Remouahe; its pulsating heart will drive you to become part of the Holy river's flow.

records.name: Nubian Giant Tree
records.descriptionTemplate: One day the seed will sprout, and the sprout will grow into a mighty tree—if it has never been tainted.

records.name: Operative
records.descriptionTemplate: The lower-ranking the member, the more exhilarated they feel about this rare and significant operation.

records.name: Oracle Steward
records.descriptionTemplate: Offering all in worship to their god—their will unshaken, their faith unbroken.

records.name: Pure White Rat King
records.descriptionTemplate: Dissolution and cold—the two Grim Reapers of Londinium's deep winter.

records.name: Pure White Rat King
records.descriptionTemplate: Dissolution and cold—the two Grim Reapers of Londinium's deep winter.

records.name: Pure White Rat King
records.descriptionTemplate: Dissolution and cold—the two Grim Reapers of Londinium's deep winter.

records.name: Pustules
records.descriptionTemplate: A black, pustule-like monster in the shape of an eyeball.

records.name: Pustules
records.descriptionTemplate: A black, pustule-like monster in the shape of an eyeball.

records.name: Rampaging Skull Hunter
records.descriptionTemplate: Slippery and slimy—a warm home for the skulls.

records.name: Rebel Child of Fate
records.descriptionTemplate: It once resisted the fate of enslavement.

records.name: Rotten Brood
records.descriptionTemplate: At times, Miryam wonders: Is this a redundant cycle of rebirth, or God's acknowledgment of her devotion?

records.name: Sailor's Lament
records.descriptionTemplate: A sailor who once sank into the deep sea alongside a cargo ship. His tear of anguish has merged with the vessel, never to part.

records.name: Sailor's Lament
records.descriptionTemplate: The memory of sailors who sank with their cargo is etched into the ship's timbers, never to fade.

records.name: Schizophrenic
records.descriptionTemplate: "Doctor, doctor! You told me I was already cured—so why do my hallucinations still exist?"

records.name: Sea Creature
records.descriptionTemplate: The Shapeshifters have chosen this form—ancient and enduring. Beware their Parasite Attack.

records.name: Sea Creature
records.descriptionTemplate: The Shapeshifters have chosen this form—flexible and resilient. Beware their Parasite Attack.

records.name: Seafarer
records.descriptionTemplate: Loyal servants. Dutiful sons. Devout believers. Any word that stands for loyalty will describe them.

records.name: Seafarer Excrescence
records.descriptionTemplate: Created by the Seafarers with Necrovia's forbidden arts, containing everything a Seafarer needs...except faith.

records.name: Seafarer Excrescence
records.descriptionTemplate: Created by the Seafarers with Necrovia's forbidden arts, containing everything a Seafarer needs...except faith.

records.name: Seafarer Guard
records.descriptionTemplate: The bond of blood granted them status above their kin. They swore to forever act at the command of their master.

records.name: Seafarer's Elite Guard
records.descriptionTemplate: The bond of blood granted them status above their kin. They swore to live and die for the arrival of the god.

records.name: Seafarer's Remains
records.descriptionTemplate: They are still alive, yet they are already dead. Within their suffering minds, only one memory remains—only the Gaze of our Lord can drive away the pain.

records.name: Senior Agent
records.descriptionTemplate: Fewer retreats, fewer rewards. More risks, more trouble.

records.name: Senior Pastor
records.descriptionTemplate: A pastor of the Church of the Lightbearers. They relay the will of the Lantern, directing the congregation in Dissolution zones.

records.name: Sergeant Major
records.descriptionTemplate: A junior officer of the Mystia Treaty Committee, typically serving as a combat squad captain.

records.name: Shadow"24"
records.descriptionTemplate: Born from the shadows, "24" despises all things weak—including mice.

records.name: Shadow's Loyal Hound
records.descriptionTemplate: He does not mind lurking in the shadows for Juliette's light. To be Juliette's hound is the most noble honor of his life.

records.name: Silent "Mother"
records.descriptionTemplate: Test subjects have no parents, yet still long for someone to take on the role of "mother"—even if she is unqualified.

records.name: Sinful Offspring: Nubia Cub
records.descriptionTemplate: A small monster with hooves, its body covered in mysterious markings. It vanishes instantly upon receiving a fatal blow.

records.name: Skeletal Sentinel
records.descriptionTemplate: He guards the decayed bones of his kin. He guards the lingering souls of his companions.

records.name: Snow Mountain's Cocoon
records.descriptionTemplate: A courageous and strong expedition member. Elworth's most beloved sacrifice.

records.name: Snow Offering
records.descriptionTemplate: The snow mountain licked his flesh. The snow mountain devoured his bones. The snow mountain enslaves his soul, seeking the next sacrifice.

records.name: Snow-Covered Bud
records.descriptionTemplate: A white, eyeball-shaped pustule monster that looks oddly familiar. Could it be frozen?

records.name: Snowthirst Bud
records.descriptionTemplate: A white, eyeball-shaped pustule monster that looks oddly familiar—and it is truly not afraid of the cold!

records.name: Spider of the Labyrinth
records.descriptionTemplate: Those who enter the spider's territory will ultimately lose their way in the countless passages and entrances.

records.name: Stonebreaker
records.descriptionTemplate: The Stonebreaker's mind has been eaten away by Dissolution, and the iron pickaxe in its hands has become a weapon. It builds up strength and unleashes a Super Heavy Blow on the third turn.

records.name: Stranded Exploration Team
records.descriptionTemplate: The snow mountain devoured those brave yet ignorant humans, leaving them no peace even in death.

records.name: Stubborn Obssession
records.descriptionTemplate: A cyborg consumed by obsession, bound to this place. It calls upon its believers and strengthens them.

records.name: Surgeon
records.descriptionTemplate: The doctor's blade was meant to cut away malady. Instead, it brings pain. An individual with very high ATK.

records.name: Swordsmanship Instructor
records.descriptionTemplate: The finest swordsmanship elites selected from all treaty nations. Handle with care.

records.name: Swordsmanship Instructor
records.descriptionTemplate: The finest swordsmanship elites selected from all treaty nations. Handle with care.

records.name: Tailor
records.descriptionTemplate: A tailor driven mad by Dissolution, cutting flesh instead of fabric. High Attack frequency.

records.name: The Awakened
records.descriptionTemplate: A product of the Sculptors' Association's modifications. Brainwashed and filled with conviction, it grows stronger with every battle.

records.name: The Chosen One
records.descriptionTemplate: A grotesque being crafted by the High Priestess, driven by absolute loyalty.

records.name: The Delirious
records.descriptionTemplate: A Hysterical patient who left of his own accord, no longer able to tell reality from memory.

records.name: The Forsaken
records.descriptionTemplate: A Hysterical patient abandoned by his beloved, no longer able to tell reality from memory.

records.name: The Missing One
records.descriptionTemplate: The end has come. The remnant spirits call out to one another: please make contact with me.

records.name: The Obsessed
records.descriptionTemplate: A cyborg consumed by obsession, yearning for revelation. It calls upon its believers and strengthens them.

records.name: The Poet
records.descriptionTemplate: A steadfast supporter—this is the fullest image she can project.

records.name: The Preaching One
records.descriptionTemplate: A malformed creation of the High Priestess, weak and commonplace.

records.name: The Proclaimer
records.descriptionTemplate: A product of the Sculptors' Association's modifications. Brainwashed and filled with conviction, it grows stronger with every battle.

records.name: The Pure Cavity
records.descriptionTemplate: A fusion of D-Slime and wax sculptures. Kind-hearted, but unbearable to look at. It splits when its HP runs low.

records.name: The Supplicant
records.descriptionTemplate: A product of the Sculptors' Association' modifications, the Dissolution Symptom is gradually deepening...

records.name: The Thirster
records.descriptionTemplate: In Cité's verse, they long for Colette's blessing.

records.name: The Worshipper
records.descriptionTemplate: A product of the Sculptors' Association's modifications. Brainwashed and filled with conviction, it grows stronger with every battle.

records.name: The poet
records.descriptionTemplate: Steadfast supporter, this is all the imagery she could create.

records.name: Thirster
records.descriptionTemplate: In the poem's Cité, they yearn for Colette's grace.

records.name: Tomb Overseer
records.descriptionTemplate: A gifted ghoul, bearing the expectations of the royal estate—what task could be more important than creating an excellent food storage facility?

records.name: Top Hat
records.descriptionTemplate: A silent gentleman who always walks with a slight bow, offering his lady companion flattering words only when the moment calls for it.

records.name: Top Hat
records.descriptionTemplate: A silent gentleman who always walks with a slight bow, offering his lady companion flattering words only when the moment calls for it.

records.name: Transcendent Gaze
records.descriptionTemplate: A product of the Sculptors' Association's modifications. Brainwashed and filled with conviction, it grows stronger with every battle.

records.name: Twin Abscesses
records.descriptionTemplate: The fate of the twins intertwines as one, pulling at each other, entangling one another. There is nowhere to run.

records.name: Ultimate Beauty
records.descriptionTemplate: In a distorted rebirth, it transcended itself and attained the most perfect form of life.

records.name: Ultimate Beauty
records.descriptionTemplate: In a distorted rebirth, it transcended itself and attained the most perfect form of life.

records.name: Ultra-Dissolute
records.descriptionTemplate: A mutant formed from a large mass of D-Slime. It splits when its HP runs low.

records.name: Watcher
records.descriptionTemplate: A clumsy thief wandering through an abandoned factory.

records.name: Wax Sculpture Caretaker
records.descriptionTemplate: 56 people have died under her careful care. She will protect other allied units.

records.name: Wax Sculpture Doctor
records.descriptionTemplate: Precise and cold as a scalpel. An individual with very high ATK.

records.name: Wax Sculpture Gentleman
records.descriptionTemplate: A dejected new-age gentleman who despises all things soft—including himself.

records.name: Wax Sculpture Housecat
records.descriptionTemplate: If it could choose, it would prefer to be called "Little Cookie."

records.name: Wax Sculpture Lady
records.descriptionTemplate: A prim and proper old-fashioned lady who, even as a wax sculpture, never misses her daily afternoon tea.

records.name: Wax Sculpture Wildcat
records.descriptionTemplate: It was once free as the wind.

records.name: Wrench Jackson
records.descriptionTemplate: His football gear does not quite fit, but his rust-covered wrench hits hard and inflicts many wounds.
